ddls:
CREATE TABLE "grants" (
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grant */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the grant opportunity */,
  "funding_agency" TEXT /* Agency providing the funding */,
  "discipline" TEXT /* Research discipline related to the grant */,
  "eligibility" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for applications */,
  "award_amount" TEXT /* Amount of funding available for the grant */,
  "deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for submitting applications */,
  "date_posted" TEXT /* Date when the grant opportunity was posted */,
  "opportunity_type" TEXT /* Type of grant opportunity (new or continuation) */,
  "application_instructions" TEXT /* Instructions for the application process */,
  "review_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria used for reviewing grant applications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grants_discipline FOREIGN KEY ("discipline") REFERENCES disciplines ("discipline_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grants_funding_agency FOREIGN KEY ("funding_agency") REFERENCES funding_agencies ("agency_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the funding agency */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the agency */,
  "agency_type" TEXT /* Type of funding agency */,
  "funding_focus" TEXT /* Primary area of focus for funding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disciplines" (
  "discipline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discipline */,
  "discipline_name" TEXT /* Name of the discipline */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the discipline */,
  "subdiscipline" TEXT /* Subcategory within the discipline */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discipline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user is affiliated with */,
  "research_experience" INTEGER /* Years of research experience */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user submitting the application */,
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grant for which application is submitted */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the application was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the application */,
  "submission_status" TEXT /* Status of the application submission process */,
  "application_score" TEXT /* Score given to the application during review */,
  "review_comments" TEXT /* Comments from reviewers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_grant_id FOREIGN KEY ("grant_id") REFERENCES grants ("grant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grant_reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the reviewer */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience in reviewing grants */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grant_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was completed */,
  "review_score" TEXT /* Score given by the reviewer */,
  "review_comments" TEXT /* Comments from the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_reviews_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES grant_reviewers ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grant_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application that received the award */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date when the award was granted */,
  "award_amount" TEXT /* Amount of funding awarded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_awards_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)
column_names: Research discipline related to the grant
